metadata.description: Builds axum Router with all API routes, auth middleware, CORS, and static file fallback
Unified HTTP error type with StatusCode + message, handles PG constraint violations
Bearer token auth middleware, optional via API_TOKEN env var
Orchestrates news fetching, Gemini summarization, Vegapunk ingestion, and DB persistence in a polling loop
RSS/Atom feed fetcher using feed_rs parser
Calls Google Gemini API to summarize news for FX trading impact
Stub implementation for upcoming economic events (Phase 0)
Replays historical candles through a Strategy, using SimTrader for in-memory trade simulation
In-memory simulated trader for backtests, FX-only, no overnight fees
Referenced via Arc in AppState for real-time price data

nodes.label: auto_trader_executor
nodes.detail: Trade execution crate with risk_gate, position_sizer, and trader modules

nodes.label: auto_trader_market
nodes.detail: Market data crate with exchange feeds, indicators, price store, and provider abstraction

nodes.label: db::pool
nodes.detail: Creates PgPool with max 10 connections and runs migrations

nodes.label: create_pool
nodes.detail: Creates PgPool from database_url, runs migrations, max 10 connections

nodes.label: Notification
nodes.detail: DB row for trade notifications with kind (trade_opened/trade_closed), trade_id, account_id, pnl_amount, exit_reason

nodes.label: db::notifications
nodes.detail: Notification CRUD: insert_trade_opened, insert_trade_closed, list with pagination/filters, mark_all_read, purge_old_read

nodes.label: insert_trade_opened
nodes.detail: Insert trade_opened notification row

nodes.label: insert_trade_closed
nodes.detail: Insert trade_closed notification with exit_price, pnl_amount, exit_reason required

nodes.label: TradingAccount
nodes.detail: Unified trading account: id, name, account_type (paper/live), exchange, strategy, initial_balance, current_balance, leverage, currency

nodes.label: db::trading_accounts
nodes.detail: CRUD for trading_accounts table with balance management, recalculation, and validation

nodes.label: CreateTradingAccount
nodes.detail: Request payload for account creation: name, exchange, initial_balance, leverage, strategy, account_type, currency

nodes.label: UpdateTradingAccount
nodes.detail: Partial update: name, leverage, strategy fields (deny_unknown_fields)

nodes.label: recalculate_balance
nodes.detail: Recalculate current_balance = initial_balance + SUM(pnl_amount) - SUM(fees) from closed trades

nodes.label: recalculate_all_balances
nodes.detail: Set-based bulk balance recalculation, skips accounts with open/closing trades

nodes.label: one_live_per_exchange
nodes.detail: Only one live account per exchange allowed, enforced by app-layer check + DB partial unique index

nodes.label: db::trades
nodes.detail: Trade DB access: insert, close lock/release, margin lock, overnight fee, update_trade_closed

nodes.label: insert_trade
nodes.detail: Insert trade row with all fields including max_hold_until

nodes.label: lock_margin
nodes.detail: Deduct margin from current_balance and insert margin_lock account_event

nodes.label: acquire_close_lock
nodes.detail: CAS transition open->closing with stale recovery for orphaned closing trades (300s threshold)

nodes.label: CloseLockAcquired
nodes.detail: Result of acquire_close_lock: trade + was_stale_recovery flag

nodes.label: release_close_lock
nodes.detail: Rollback closing->open when exchange API call fails

nodes.label: apply_overnight_fee
nodes.detail: Atomically deduct overnight fee from balance, increment trade.fees, insert account_event

nodes.label: update_trade_closed
nodes.detail: Finalize trade as closed with exit_price, pnl, exit_reason

nodes.label: STALE_CLOSING_THRESHOLD_SECS
nodes.detail: 300 seconds threshold for orphaned closing trade recovery

nodes.label: db::dashboard
nodes.detail: Dashboard queries: summary stats, PnL history, strategy/pair stats, hourly winrate, trade list, evaluated balance, balance history

nodes.label: SummaryStats
nodes.detail: Dashboard summary: total_trades, win_count, total_pnl, total_fees, max_drawdown

nodes.label: PnlHistoryRow
nodes.detail: Daily PnL with cumulative sum via window function

nodes.label: StrategyStats
nodes.detail: Per-strategy aggregates from daily_summary

nodes.label: PairStats
nodes.detail: Per-pair aggregates from daily_summary

nodes.label: HourlyWinrate
nodes.detail: Win rate grouped by hour of entry_at

nodes.label: EvaluatedBalance
nodes.detail: current_balance + locked_margin + unrealized_pnl = evaluated_balance

nodes.label: BalanceHistoryAccount
nodes.detail: Per-account daily balance history reconstructed from initial_balance + account_events

nodes.label: db::summary
nodes.detail: Daily summary cache: upsert, rebuild from trades, max drawdown calculation

nodes.label: daily_summary
nodes.detail: Aggregation cache: (date, strategy, pair, account_type, exchange, account_id) -> trade_count, win_count, total_pnl, max_drawdown

nodes.label: upsert_daily_summary
nodes.detail: Incremental upsert of daily summary with delta counts

nodes.label: rebuild_daily_summary
nodes.detail: Full rebuild of daily_summary for a date from trades source of truth

nodes.label: update_daily_max_drawdown
nodes.detail: Calculate and update max drawdown per (strategy, pair, exchange, account_id) group

nodes.label: executor::risk_gate
nodes.detail: Entry-path price-tick freshness gate, rejects signals with stale market data

nodes.label: GateDecision
nodes.detail: Pass or Reject(RejectReason) for risk gate checks

nodes.label: RejectReason
nodes.detail: PriceTickStale { age_secs } — only variant currently

nodes.label: eval_price_freshness
nodes.detail: Pure function: reject when age_secs > price_freshness_secs

nodes.label: PositionSizer
nodes.detail: Converts allocation_pct to concrete quantity with no-liquidation constraint (maintenance_margin_rate=50%)

nodes.label: calculate_quantity
nodes.detail: Compute trade quantity: max_alloc = (1-maint_rate)/(leverage*sl_pct), truncate to min_lot

nodes.label: executor::position_sizer
nodes.detail: Position sizing with full-bet-within-no-liquidation-constraint strategy

nodes.label: Trader
nodes.detail: Unified trader for paper+live: pool, exchange, account_id, api, price_store, notifier, position_sizer, dry_run

nodes.label: executor::trader
nodes.detail: Unified Trader serving both paper (dry_run=true) and live (dry_run=false) accounts

nodes.label: Trader::fill_open
nodes.detail: Signal to fill: dry_run uses PriceStore bid/ask, live uses send_child_order + poll_executions

nodes.label: truncate_yen
nodes.detail: Round yen amounts toward zero to whole yen for ledger consistency

nodes.label: aggregate_executions
nodes.detail: VWAP aggregation of execution list into (avg_price, total_size)

nodes.label: market::indicators
nodes.detail: Technical indicators: SMA, EMA, RSI, Bollinger Bands, ATR, Donchian Channel, ADX, Keltner Channels

nodes.label: sma
nodes.detail: Simple Moving Average over last N prices

nodes.label: ema
nodes.detail: Exponential Moving Average

nodes.label: rsi
nodes.detail: Relative Strength Index

nodes.label: bollinger_bands
nodes.detail: Returns (lower, middle, upper) using population stddev

nodes.label: atr
nodes.detail: Average True Range with Wilder's smoothing

nodes.label: donchian_channel
nodes.detail: Rolling min low / max high, textbook Turtle definition with include_current option

nodes.label: adx
nodes.detail: Average Directional Index for trend strength measurement

nodes.label: keltner_channels
nodes.detail: EMA middle + ATR*mult bands, used for TTM Squeeze

nodes.label: GmoFxFeed
nodes.detail: GMO Coin FX REST polling feed: 5s interval ticker -> CandleBuilder for M5+H1

nodes.label: market::gmo_fx
nodes.detail: GMO Coin FX public API ticker feed with candle building

nodes.label: NullExchangeApi
nodes.detail: Stub ExchangeApi that errors on every call, used for dry_run accounts without real API

nodes.label: MarketMonitor
nodes.detail: OANDA candle-polling market feed with indicator computation (SMA, EMA, RSI, ATR, ADX, BB, Keltner)

nodes.label: market::monitor
nodes.detail: OANDA-based MarketMonitor polling candles at fixed interval with indicator enrichment

nodes.label: MarketDataProvider
nodes.detail: Async trait: get_candles(pair, timeframe, count) and get_latest_price(pair)

nodes.label: market::provider
nodes.detail: MarketDataProvider trait definition

nodes.label: PriceStore
nodes.detail: Thread-safe in-memory store of latest tick per (exchange, pair) with health monitoring

nodes.label: FeedKey
nodes.detail: Composite key: (Exchange, Pair) for price store lookups

nodes.label: LatestTick
nodes.detail: Price tick with LTP, optional bid/ask, timestamp

nodes.label: FeedStatus
nodes.detail: Healthy (<=60s), Stale (>60s), Missing (no tick ever)

nodes.label: FeedHealth
nodes.detail: Per-feed health report: exchange, pair, status, last_tick_age_secs

nodes.label: market::price_store
nodes.detail: In-memory latest tick store with monotonic-timestamp guard and health reporting

nodes.label: MarketFeed
nodes.detail: Trait for exchange-specific price feeds: run(price_store, price_tx) long-running task

nodes.label: market::market_feed
nodes.detail: MarketFeed trait abstraction for exchange price feed implementations

nodes.label: BitflyerPrivateApi
nodes.detail: bitFlyer Private API client with HMAC auth and rate limiter

nodes.label: OandaPrivateApi
nodes.detail: OANDA Private API client implementing ExchangeApi trait

nodes.label: account_events
nodes.detail: Ledger of account balance changes: margin_lock, trade_close, overnight_fee with amount and balance_after

nodes.label: trades
nodes.detail: Core trade table with status lifecycle: open -> closing -> closed

nodes.label: trading_accounts
nodes.detail: Unified trading accounts (paper+live) with current_balance tracking

nodes.label: notifications
nodes.detail: Trade notifications with read/unread state and 30-day purge

nodes.label: price_candles
nodes.detail: Historical price candles used for evaluated balance calculation

nodes.label: bitflyer_private
nodes.description: bitFlyer Lightning Private REST API client with HMAC-SHA256 auth and rate limiting

nodes.label: SendChildOrderRequest
nodes.description: Request body for POST /v1/me/sendchildorder

nodes.label: ChildOrder
nodes.description: Response element from GET /v1/me/getchildorders

nodes.label: Execution
nodes.description: Response element from GET /v1/me/getexecutions

nodes.label: ExchangePosition
nodes.description: Response element from GET /v1/me/getpositions for FX/CFD

nodes.label: Collateral
nodes.description: Response from GET /v1/me/getcollateral

nodes.label: ChildOrderState
nodes.description: Order states: Active, Completed, Canceled, Expired, Rejected

nodes.label: ChildOrderType
nodes.description: Order types: Market, Limit

nodes.label: Side
nodes.description: Trade sides: Buy, Sell

nodes.label: CandleBuilder
nodes.description: Aggregates ticks into OHLCV candles for M1/M5/H1 timeframes with bid/ask tracking

nodes.label: OandaClient
nodes.description: OANDA v3 REST market data client with retry logic for candles and pricing

nodes.label: OandaApiError
nodes.description: Error types for OANDA API: Http, Api, Parse, Config

nodes.label: BitflyerMonitor
nodes.description: WebSocket monitor for bitFlyer ticker data, builds M5 and H1 candles with indicator computation

nodes.label: auto_trader_strategy
nodes.description: Strategy crate containing trading strategy implementations

nodes.label: DonchianTrendV1
nodes.description: Turtle System 1 adapted: 20-bar/10-bar Donchian channels on H1, ATR-based SL/sizing, trailing channel exit

nodes.label: DonchianTrendEvolveV1
nodes.description: Parameterizable Donchian Trend strategy with JSON params from DB, weekly LLM evolution

nodes.label: SwingLLMv1
nodes.description: LLM-driven FX swing strategy using Vegapunk GraphRAG context and Gemini Flash for trade decisions

nodes.label: BbMeanRevertV1
nodes.description: Bollinger Bands mean-reversion strategy on M5 with RSI filter, capitulation confirmation, SMA20 exit

nodes.label: SqueezeMomentumV1
nodes.description: TTM Squeeze strategy on H1 with BB/KC compression detection, momentum direction, Chandelier Exit trailing

nodes.label: StrategyEngine
nodes.description: Dispatches PriceEvents to registered strategies, manages warmup, macro updates, and exit signals

nodes.label: dashboard-ui
nodes.description: React+Vite+TailwindCSS trading dashboard with TanStack Query/Table/Router

nodes.label: App
nodes.description: Root React component with BrowserRouter, nav tabs, and route definitions

nodes.label: TradeTable
nodes.description: Paginated trade history table with expandable timeline (OPEN/overnight/CLOSE events)

nodes.label: PageFilters
nodes.description: Dashboard filter bar for exchange, account, and time period selection

nodes.label: PairChart
nodes.description: Bar chart showing PnL by trading pair using Recharts

nodes.label: StrategyChart
nodes.description: Bar chart showing PnL by strategy using Recharts

nodes.label: MarketFeedHealthBanner
nodes.description: Alert banner showing degraded/missing market feed status

nodes.label: VegapunkClient
nodes.description: Client for Vegapunk GraphRAG knowledge engine used by SwingLLM strategy

nodes.label: Gemini Flash API
nodes.description: Google Gemini Flash LLM API used for swing trade decisions

nodes.label: Candle
nodes.description: OHLCV candle with pair, exchange, timeframe, bid/ask

nodes.label: PriceEvent
nodes.description: Event carrying a completed candle plus computed indicators

nodes.label: Signal
nodes.description: Trading signal with direction, SL, TP, confidence, allocation

nodes.label: ExitSignal
nodes.description: Dynamic exit signal with trade_id, reason, close_price

nodes.label: StrategyExitReason
nodes.description: Exit reasons: TrailingChannel, MeanReached, TrailingMa

nodes.label: 1R Guard
nodes.description: Risk management rule: trailing exits only activate after unrealized profit >= initial SL distance

nodes.label: Chandelier Exit
nodes.description: ATR-based trailing stop using highest-high/lowest-low minus ATR*3 with delay phase

nodes.label: Dashboard UI
nodes.description: React + Recharts frontend for the auto-trader dashboard, built with TanStack Query v5 and Tailwind CSS

nodes.label: NotificationBell
nodes.description: React component rendering a bell icon with unread notification count badge, toggles NotificationDropdown on click and marks all as read

nodes.label: AccountForm
nodes.description: Modal form for creating/editing trading accounts with fields for name, exchange, strategy, leverage, currency, account_type

nodes.label: NotificationDropdown
nodes.description: Dropdown popover showing recent 20 notifications with trade open/close details, relative timestamps, and account name mapping

nodes.label: BalanceChart
nodes.description: Multi-account line chart showing realized PnL balance history over time using Recharts LineChart, filtered by account_type

nodes.label: KpiCards
nodes.description: Grid of 4 KPI cards displaying net PnL, win rate, expected value, and max drawdown from dashboard summary API

nodes.label: PnlChart
nodes.description: Cumulative PnL area chart using Recharts AreaChart with gradient fill based on positive/negative values

nodes.label: RiskBadge
nodes.description: Shared chip component rendering strategy risk level (low/medium/high) with color-coded styling, plus useStrategyCatalogQuery and useStrategyRiskLookup hooks

nodes.label: HourlyChart
nodes.description: Bar chart showing win rate by hour (0-23) using Recharts BarChart with trade count tooltip

nodes.label: API Types (TypeScript)
nodes.description: TypeScript type definitions for all API responses: TradingAccount, Strategy, SummaryResponse, TradeRow, Notification, MarketPrice, MarketFeedHealth, etc.

nodes.label: API Client
nodes.description: Centralized fetch-based API client with Bearer token auth, providing namespaced methods for dashboard, trades, positions, accounts, strategies, notifications, market, and health endpoints

nodes.label: Positions Page
nodes.description: Page displaying open positions table with unrealized PnL, net PnL computed from market prices, strategy risk badges, and page filters

nodes.label: Trades Page
nodes.description: Page showing trade history grouped by exchange category (crypto/fx/other) with per-account TradeTable components and period filters

nodes.label: Overview Page
nodes.description: Main dashboard overview with KPI cards, PnL chart, and balance chart split into live and paper account sections

nodes.label: Notifications Page
nodes.description: Full notification history page with paginated table, period and kind filters, showing trade open/close events with PnL and exit reasons

nodes.label: Accounts Page
nodes.description: Account management page with CRUD operations for trading accounts, showing balances, unrealized PnL, evaluated balance, and strategy risk badges

nodes.label: Analysis Page
nodes.description: Analysis page composing StrategyChart, PairChart, and HourlyChart with shared PageFilters

nodes.label: Strategies Page
nodes.description: Read-only strategy catalog page displaying strategy cards with risk badges, category labels, algorithm details, and default parameters

nodes.label: TradingAccount
nodes.description: Core account type with id, name, exchange, balances, leverage, strategy, account_type (paper/live), and enriched fields like unrealized_pnl and evaluated_balance

nodes.label: Strategy
nodes.description: Strategy catalog type with name, display_name, category (fx/crypto), risk_level (low/medium/high), description, algorithm, and default_params

nodes.label: Notification
nodes.description: Notification type for trade_opened/trade_closed events with trade details, PnL, exit_reason, and read_at tracking

nodes.label: TradeRow
nodes.description: Trade record with full details: strategy, pair, exchange, direction, prices, quantity, leverage, fees, pnl, timestamps, exit_reason, status

nodes.label: DashboardFilter
nodes.description: Filter parameters for dashboard queries: exchange, account_id, account_type, strategy, pair, from/to date range

nodes.label: MarketFeedHealth
nodes.description: Market feed health status type with exchange, pair, status (healthy/stale/missing), and last_tick_age_secs

nodes.label: Vegapunk Integration Spec
nodes.description: Specification for integrating Vegapunk GraphRAG engine for trade decision rationale tracking, using gRPC with IngestRaw, Search, Feedback, and Merge RPCs on fx-trading schema

nodes.label: Crypto Paper Trading Spec
nodes.description: Design spec for bitFlyer Crypto CFD paper trading integration, covering WebSocket price feeds, candle building, position sizing, overnight fees, and multi-account paper trading

nodes.label: System Design Spec
nodes.description: Main design specification for the FX auto-trading tool: event-driven architecture with market-monitor, strategy-engine, executors, recorder, vegapunk-client, macro-analyst, backtest, and dashboard

nodes.label: Vegapunk
nodes.description: GraphRAG knowledge engine for storing and searching trade decision rationales, connected via gRPC

nodes.label: bitFlyer CFD
nodes.description: bitFlyer Crypto CFD exchange for BTC/JPY paper trading via Lightning WebSocket API

nodes.label: OANDA
nodes.description: OANDA FX trading platform connected via REST API for price data and (future) live trading

nodes.label: bb_mean_revert_v1
nodes.description: Bollinger Band mean reversion strategy (safe/conservative), 63% win rate with R:R 0.79 in 5-day review

nodes.label: donchian_trend_v1
nodes.description: Donchian channel trend-following strategy (normal), 27% win rate with R:R 1.51 in 5-day review, underperforming on M5 timeframe

nodes.label: squeeze_momentum_v1
nodes.description: TTM Squeeze momentum strategy (aggressive), 25% win rate with R:R 1.40 in 5-day review, underperforming on M5 timeframe

nodes.label: donchian_trend_evolve_v1
nodes.description: Vegapunk-linked evolution variant of donchian_trend_v1, same initial parameters, weekly parameter evolution via Vegapunk batch

nodes.label: trend_follow_v1
nodes.description: Short-term rule-based FX strategy using MA crossover + RSI filter, first implemented strategy

nodes.label: swing_llm_v1
nodes.description: Swing trading strategy using Vegapunk search + Gemini Flash LLM for decision assistance, disabled by default

nodes.label: Strategy Performance Review 2026-04-19
nodes.description: 5-day performance review of 4 strategies on bitFlyer CFD M5, establishing KPIs: mean-reversion needs 55%+ win rate and 1.0+ R:R, trend-following needs 30%+ win rate and 3.0+ R:R

nodes.label: Market Feed Health Plan
nodes.description: Implementation plan for PriceStore, market prices API, feed health API, unrealized PnL on positions, and dashboard improvements

nodes.label: Account Type (paper/live)
nodes.description: Trading accounts are either paper (simulation) or live (real money), displayed as paper/live sections on overview

nodes.label: Exchange Category (fx/crypto)
nodes.description: Exchanges categorized as fx (oanda, gmo_fx) or crypto (bitflyer_cfd) for filtering strategies and grouping accounts

nodes.label: Risk-Based Position Sizing
nodes.description: Position sizing using 1-2% of account balance as max loss per trade, calculated as max_loss / SL_distance

nodes.label: Overnight Fee
nodes.description: CFD overnight holding fee of 0.04%/day on position value, simulated in paper trading and accumulated in trades.fees

nodes.label: fx-trading (Vegapunk Schema)
nodes.description: Vegapunk GraphRAG schema with TradeDecision, MarketAnalysis, TradeResult, MarketEvent, Strategy nodes and BASED_ON, TRIGGERED_BY, RESULTED_IN, USED_STRATEGY edges

nodes.label: TanStack Query v5
nodes.description: React data fetching library used for all API calls with 15s refetch interval and query invalidation

nodes.label: Recharts
nodes.description: React charting library used for LineChart, AreaChart, and BarChart components in the dashboard

properties.goal: Add in-app notification system with bell icon, unread badge, dropdown, full-history page, DB-backed read/unread state
Integrate bitFlyer Crypto CFD BTC/JPY paper trading into existing FX pipeline
Unify paper/live trading under single Trader implementation with dry_run flag
Build OANDA demo API price fetch, technical indicator strategy, paper trade execution bot
Build performance dashboard with backend API and React frontend
Add Signal OrderType, Notifier crate, DB schema for live trading foundation
Build regime-aware learning loop with Vegapunk, market regime classification, auto-tune strategy params weekly
Implement full Phase 0 scope for 24/365 paper trading with TrendFollowV1 + SwingLLMv1
Split Trades page into one table per paper account grouped by exchange
Build bitFlyer Private REST API wrapper with HMAC-SHA256 auth

properties.scope: FX_BTC_JPY live trading with bitFlyer Lightning
In-app trade open/close notifications with bell icon and full history page
Split trade history into per-account tables grouped by exchange
Price feed health monitoring, unrealized PnL display, positions tab improvements
ATR-based dynamic SL, risk-linked position sizing, timeframe change for Donchian/Squeeze
Regime-aware learning loop with Vegapunk GraphRAG

properties.purpose: Runtime-mutable parameters for evolve strategies, read at startup and updated weekly
Build OHLCV candles from ticker data with bid/ask

properties.description: paper account=true (simulated bid/ask fill), live account=false (real bitFlyer API order)

nodes.label: icons.svg (SVG sprite sheet)
nodes.description: SVG sprite sheet containing social media and UI icon symbols (Bluesky, Discord, GitHub, X/Twitter, documentation, social) used across the dashboard UI. Each icon is defined as a <symbol> element with a unique ID for reuse via <use> references.

metadata.visual_elements: Social media logos (Bluesky butterfly, Discord controller, GitHub octocat, X bird), documentation code bracket icon, social star-badge icon

nodes.label: favicon.svg (Vite lightning bolt)
nodes.description: Purple lightning bolt favicon for the dashboard UI browser tab. Uses a stylized zigzag bolt shape filled with gradient purple (#863bff / #7e14ff) and cyan (#47bfff) ellipse overlays masked inside the bolt silhouette, creating a vibrant holographic effect.

metadata.visual_elements: Lightning bolt shape with masked gradient ellipses

nodes.label: hero.png (3D isometric app icon template)
nodes.description: Hero image showing a 3D isometric view of a rounded-square app icon placeholder. Features a white top face with a purple/violet metallic edge on the bottom layer, connected by dashed perspective lines. Likely a decorative or branding element for the dashboard landing page.

metadata.visual_elements: 3D isometric rounded square, purple metallic edge, dashed construction lines, white faces

nodes.label: vite.svg (Vite framework logo)
nodes.description: Vite build tool logo SVG with the characteristic lightning bolt in purple (#9135ff) enclosed in parentheses. Features the same holographic gradient masking technique as the favicon, with purple and cyan ellipse overlays. The parentheses use a dark/light adaptive fill via prefers-color-scheme media query.

metadata.visual_elements: Lightning bolt in parentheses, adaptive dark/light mode parentheses

nodes.label: react.svg (React framework logo)
nodes.description: React library logo SVG showing the classic atom/orbital design - three elliptical electron orbits surrounding a central nucleus dot, rendered in cyan (#00D8FF). Standard React branding icon used to indicate React as the frontend framework.

metadata.visual_elements: Three elliptical orbits, central dot, atom symbol

nodes.label: dashboard-ui/public/
nodes.description: Public static assets directory for the dashboard UI, containing favicon and icon sprite sheet served directly without bundling.

nodes.label: dashboard-ui/src/assets/
nodes.description: Bundled asset directory for the dashboard UI, containing framework logos (Vite, React) and the hero image processed by Vite's asset pipeline.

links.detail: Trader holds Arc<dyn ExchangeApi> for order execution

metadata.handles: 23505 duplicate, 23503 FK violation with constraint disambiguation

metadata.description: MacroAnalyst feeds news text to summarizer

links.detail: Trader inserts trade notifications on open/close
Sums pnl_amount and fees from closed trades
Updates current_balance
Trader calls insert_trade, lock_margin, acquire_close_lock, update_trade_closed
Deducts margin from current_balance
Inserts margin_lock event
Uses 300s threshold for stale closing recovery
Increments trade.fees
Deducts fee from current_balance
Inserts overnight_fee event
Dashboard queries aggregate from daily_summary table
Dashboard queries hourly_winrate and trade list from trades table
Dashboard evaluated_balance and balance_history read from trading_accounts
Balance history reconstruction uses account_events (trade_close + overnight_fee)
Evaluated balance uses latest price_candles for unrealized PnL
Rebuild reads closed trades joined with trading_accounts
Rebuild triggers max drawdown recalculation after re-aggregation
Trader uses PositionSizer to compute trade quantity from signals
Trader reads bid/ask from PriceStore for dry_run fills
Aggregates exchange executions into VWAP on live fill
MarketMonitor computes SMA, EMA, RSI, ATR, ADX, BB, Keltner on fetched candles
BB uses SMA for middle line
Keltner uses EMA for middle line
Keltner uses ATR for band width
GmoFxFeed writes mid-price ticks to PriceStore

metadata.note: Favicon uses the same lightning bolt shape and holographic gradient technique as the Vite logo
